login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to continue with Alveryn.

register.title: Set up your account
register.subtitle: Create your account and verify your email to continue.
register.created: Account created. Check your email for the verification code.
register.createdNavigate: Account created. Enter the verification code to continue.

forgotPassword.title: Reset access
forgotPassword.subtitle: Request a password reset code for your account.

resetPassword.title: Choose a new password
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter the reset code and your new password.
resetPassword.successNavigate: Password reset successfully. Sign in with your new password.

verifyEmail.title: Verify your email
verifyEmail.subtitle: Enter the verification code sent to your inbox.
verifyEmail.resendCooldown: You can request another code in {{seconds}}s.
verifyEmail.missingEmail: Enter your email before requesting a new verification code.
verifyEmail.successNavigate: Email verified successfully. Sign in to continue.

legal.footnote: By continuing you agree to the Alveryn product flow.

oauth.finishError: Google sign-in could not be completed.
oauth.startError: Google sign-in could not be completed. Try again.

validation.passwordMin: Password must have at least 8 characters
